name: Sprott Physical Uranium Trust
description: The Sprott Physical Uranium Trust is the world's largest physical uranium fund, providing investors with a secure, convenient, and liquid alternative for investing in physical uranium. The Trust was created to invest and hold substantially all of its assets in physical uranium in the form of uranium hexafluoride and uranium concentrates. Managed by Sprott Asset Management LP, the Trust aims to provide a cost-effective and convenient way for investors to gain exposure to the price of uranium without the logistical challenges of physical storage and delivery.
